name: Short Ribs and Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the ribs.
2. Combine flour and seasoning in a bowl.
3. Rub the mixture onto the ribs, using all of it.
4. Place the seasoned ribs in a 2-1/2 quart baking dish.
5. Bake at 450°F for 30 minutes.
6. Spoon off any excess fat from the baking dish.
7. Lower the temperature to 325°F and arrange onion slices over the top of the ribs.
8. Pour tomato paste mixed with water evenly over the onions.
9. Cover the baking dish and bake for 1-1/2 hours, or until the ribs are tender.
10. During the last 45 minutes of baking, add sliced carrots and celery.
11. Skim any excess fat from the baking dish before serving.
12. Serve the ribs on a platter.
13. Stir the cooked noodles into the vegetable and gravy drippings.
14. Add salt to taste before serving around the ribs.
